  • Uses of Command in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.bukkit

    Classes in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.bukkit with annotations of type Command
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AllFeaturesCommand
     
    class 
    AllFeaturesCommand.PanelCommands
     
    class 
    BukkitResolveCommand
    Covers @Resolve with different sender type variants.
    class 
    BukkitSuggestCommand
    Covers @Suggest in Bukkit context: field, method, @Greedy+@Suggest, and suggest methods with different sender types.
    class 
    PermissionCommand
    Covers @Permission: class-level, method-level, custom message, method override.
    class 
    SenderTypeCommand
    Covers sender type variations: Player, CommandSender, mixed.

  • Uses of Command in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.paper

    Classes in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.paper with annotations of type Command
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AllFeaturesCommand
     
    class 
    AllFeaturesCommand.PanelCommands
     
    class 
    PaperPermissionCommand
    Covers @Permission: class-level, method-level, custom message, method override.
    class 
    PaperResolveCommand
    Covers @Resolve with different sender type variants for Paper.
    class 
    PaperSenderCommand
    Covers Paper-specific sender resolution: CommandSourceStack, Player via cast helper.
    class 
    PaperSenderTypeCommand
    Covers sender type variations: CommandSourceStack, CommandSender, mixed.
    class 
    PaperSuggestCommand
    Covers @Suggest in Paper context: field, method, @Greedy+@Suggest, and suggest methods with different sender types.

  • Uses of Command in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.standalone

    Classes in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.standalone with annotations of type Command
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CalculatorCommand
    Comprehensive example command demonstrating all CraftCommand features.
    class 
    CalculatorCommand.AdvancedCommands
    Nested subcommand class demonstrating class-level subcommands.
    class 
    CalculatorCommand.ResolveCommands
    Nested subcommand class demonstrating Resolve referencing a resolver method defined in the outer class.
    class 
    EdgeCaseCommand
    Covers edge cases: Greedy zero args, Greedy+Default, enum param, description assertion, Default+Name, multiple aliases.
    class 
    ResolveCommand
    Covers Resolve combinations: named, sender-level, Default, Min, ValidateWith, implicit by return type, nested.
    class 
    SuggestCommand
    Covers Suggest combinations: field, method, Greedy+Suggest, Name+Suggest, Default+Suggest, Resolve+Suggest (on resolver param), Greedy+Name+Suggest.
    class 
    ValidationCommand
    Covers validation annotation combinations: Min alone, Max alone, Min+Max, custom messages, Min+ValidateWith stack, Default+Min, Default+Max, Default+ValidateWith.
    Methods in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.example.standalone with annotations of type Command
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CalculatorCommand.add(Object sender, int num1, int num2)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.clamped(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.defaultAndGreedy(Object sender, String greeting, String text)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.defaultMax(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.defaultMin(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.defaultName(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.defaultSuggest(Object sender, String color)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.defaultVw(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.descriptionCheck(Object sender)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.ResolveCommands.display(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.divide(Object sender, int num1, int num2)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.echo(Object sender, String message)
    Demonstrates @Greedy on String (joins remaining args with spaces).
    void
    CalculatorCommand.enumOp(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.MathOp op, int num1, int num2)
    Demonstrates enum parameter resolution (via registerProvider in CLIApp).
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.enumParam(Object sender, EdgeCaseCommand.Color color)
     
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.greedyDefault(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.greedyEmpty(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.greedyNameSuggest(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.greedyResolve(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.greedyResolveWithPrefix(Object sender, String prefix, String text)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.greedySuggest(Object sender, String text)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.implicitResolve(Object sender, ResolveCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.AdvancedCommands.logarithm(Object sender, double value, double base)
    Demonstrates nested class with its own @Default parameters.
    void
    ValidationCommand.maxCustomMessage(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.maxOnly(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.minCustomMessage(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.minMax(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.minOnly(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    ValidationCommand.minVwStack(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    EdgeCaseCommand.multiAlias(Object sender, String value)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.multiply(Object sender, int num1, int num2)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.namedResolve(Object sender, ResolveCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.namedResolver(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.nameSuggest(Object sender, String color)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.parse(Object sender, double value)
    Demonstrates @Greedy on non-String type (joins remaining args, then parses).
    void
    CalculatorCommand.AdvancedCommands.power(Object sender, double base, double exponent)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.print(Object sender, String text)
    Demonstrates @Default with default value on String.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.repeat(Object sender, String text, int count)
    Demonstrates @Default with default value on int.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.resolveAndDefault(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt, String mode)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.resolveAndSuggest(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt, String mode)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.resolveAndValidate(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt, int level)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.resolveDefault(Object sender, ResolveCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.resolveMin(Object sender, ResolveCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.resolveSuggest(Object sender, SuggestCommand.CustomColor color)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.resolveVw(Object sender, ResolveCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.runMode(Object sender, String mode)
    Demonstrates method-based @Suggest with sender, args, current parameters.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.runOp(Object sender, String op, int num1, int num2)
    Demonstrates field-based @Suggest for operator selection.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.runPoint(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt)
    Demonstrates parameter-level @Resolve with named method.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.sameSender(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    ResolveCommand.senderResolve(ResolveCommand.CustomSender sender)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.sendMessage(Object sender, String target, String message)
    Demonstrates @Name to override parameter name in usage messages.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.setCoordinate(Object sender, double x, double y, double z)
    Demonstrates @ValidateWith with custom validation method.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.setLevel(Object sender, int level, double multiplier)
    Demonstrates @Min and @Max validation on numeric types.
    void
    CalculatorCommand.AdvancedCommands.sqrt(Object sender, double number)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.subtract(Object sender, int num1, int num2)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.suggestAndDefault(Object sender, String mode, int count)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestField(Object sender, String color)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestMethod(Object sender, String shape)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestMethodContext(Object sender, String shape)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestMethodFull(Object sender, String shape)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestMethodSender(Object sender, String shape)
     
    void
    SuggestCommand.suggestMethodSenderCurrent(Object sender, String shape)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.suggestResolver(Object sender, CalculatorCommand.Point pt)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.sum(Object sender, int[] numbers)
    Demonstrates @Greedy on array type (creates array from remaining args).
    void
    ValidationCommand.vwCustomMessage(Object sender, int value)
     
    void
    CalculatorCommand.whoAmI(CalculatorCommand.CustomSender sender)
    Demonstrates sender-level @Resolve.
